case_title: AAA BUSINESS SUPPLIES & INTERIORS VS. VELTI-SPEAR TOWER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,406.00 FILED BY AAA BUSINESS SUPPLIES  & INTERIORS AS TO DEFENDANT VELTI-SPEAR TOWER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND. PER PETER, LEGAL AGT., COMPANY FILED FOR BANKRUPTCY AND NO SERVICE WILL BE ACCEPTED. (FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AAA BUSINESS SUPPLIES  & INTERIORS AS TO DEFENDANT VELTI-SPEAR TOWER

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00) "THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE OF A BAD ADDRESS. PER STAFF, NO SERVICE ACCEPTED AT BUSINESS TO BE SERVED DOES NOT MATCH." FILED BY PLAINTIFF AAA BUSINESS SUPPLIES  & INTERIORS AS TO DEFENDANT VELTI-SPEAR TOWER
